creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
P.S. math/cryptominisat expects math/cadiback to have a library (like libcadiback.so) [0]. Could you, please, have a look at cadiback Makefile, whether it's possible to build also the library as well as the executable?

Thanks in advance

[0] https://github.com/msoos/cryptominisat/blob/8c265503cfc02eeda3fcbf101578e8eea9f398f5/CMakeLists.txt#L537
